The description for this webinar has changed. ----------------------------------------------------------- Hello Benjamin Barber, thanks for registering for "2026 RED SKY ALLIANCE REDSHORT REPORTING." Welcome to our REDSHORT webinar. 'RED' As In Something Important From Red Sky Alliance & 'SHORT' As In Once A Week In 10 Minutes Or Less. %0D%0A%0D%0AAPRIL 1ST, REDSHORT — AI NOW & IN THE FUTURE: MORALS & ETHICS — Our webinar will explore the critical intersection of Artificial Intelligence, morals, and ethics. Hosts Bill Schenkelberg and Aaron Birnbaum examine the integrity of AI creators and the necessity of enforceable guardrails. Key discussions include AI’s potential for harm—referencing Asimov’s rules—and its impact on childhood development and basic skill acquisition. Ultimately, the session evaluates long-term social effects and our collective digital future. Join Us To Find Out More. Please send your questions, comments and feedback to: pbierau@redskyalliance.com *********************************************************** After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the webinar. *********************************************************** This webinar meets 9 times. Wed, Apr 1, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, Apr 8, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, Apr 15, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, Apr 22, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, Apr 29, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 6, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 13, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 20, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT Wed, May 27, 2026 6:30 AM - 7:00 AM PDT 1. If you cannot click the button, right-click it to copy and paste the link directly into your browser. Before joining, be sure to check system requirements to avoid any connection issues. 2. Choose one of the following audio options:

To use your computer's audio:

When the webinar begins, you will be connected to audio using your computer's microphone and speakers (VoIP). A headset is recommended.

or To use your telephone: If you prefer to use your phone, you must select "Use Telephone" after joining the webinar and call in using the numbers below.
